title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 49.150 - Penalty for violating section 49.140
text:
49.150.  Penalty for violating section 49.140. — Any county commissioner who shall violate any of the provisions of section 49.140 or who shall do any of the acts or enter into any of the contracts prohibited or declared unlawful in said section, shall be guilty of a class B misdemeanor.
(RSMo 1939 § 2492, A.L. 1983 S.B. 219) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2090; 1919 § 2586; 1909 § 4093 
Effective 1-01-85
